case_title: DAVE GOMBERG VS. AARON C JACKSON

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,289.00 FILED BY GOMBERG, DAVE AS TO DEFENDANT JACKSON, AARON C ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-13-2012 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF GOMBERG, DAVE AS TO DEFENDANT JACKSON, AARON C
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JUN-18-2012, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT JACKSON, AARON C
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM JUDGE MARK MURRAY FILED BY GOMBERG, DAVE JACKSON, AARON C

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-13-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-13-2012 BY JUDGE PRO TEM MARK MURRAY. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: MARK MURRAY. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-13-2012 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GOMBERG, DAVE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT JACKSON, AARON C JACKSON, ALEX $2,288.39 PRINCIPAL, $60.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,348.39, DEFENDANT ALEX JACKSON TO PAY PLAINTIFF. AT TRIAL PLAINTIFF ORALLY AMENDED COMPLAINT TO ADD ALEX JACKSON AS A DEFENDANT. ALEX JACKSON WAIVED FURTHER NOTICE AND SERVICE AND CONSENTED TO THIS AMENDMENT SO AS TO PROCEED TODAY AND NOT REQUIRE A NEW FILING. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT JACKSON, AARON C JACKSON, ALEX
